At its core is a sculpted natural stone kitchen designed for direct cooking—eliminating the need for conventional stovetops. A bespoke 360-degree rotating ceiling-mounted TV, finished in matching stone, reflects the seamless design language throughout. Everyday features such as the sink, flush, and storage elements are discreetly integrated into stone surfaces, revealing themselves only when needed—creating a clean, minimalist aesthetic with cutting-edge functionality.

Situated close to Ibn Battuta Mall, the area provides a self-sufficient lifestyle with convenient access to supermarkets, petrol stations, restaurants, and laundry facilities.
Developed by Nakheel in 2009, Discovery Gardens is known for its lively low-rise apartment buildings and extensive green spaces, ideal for walking and outdoor activities.
Residents can also take advantage of community swimming pools and tennis courts. The neighborhood mainly attracts mid-income South Asian families and corporate professionals.
Nestled in vibrant Jebel Ali, Discovery Gardens offers seamless connectivity via Sheikh Zayed Road and E311, plus its own metro station. You’re just minutes from:
-Ibn Battuta Mall (5 min)
-Dubai Marina (10 min)
-Downtown Dubai (25 min)

title: Renovated | 1 Bed | Large Terrace | Boulevard View
raw_area: Seventh Heaven, Al Barari, Dubai
description:
Positioned within the sought-after Seventh Heaven community, this exceptionally spacious one-bedroom residence offers a rare opportunity to acquire one of the largest layouts within the development.

Spanning an impressive 2,904 sq.ft including expansive outdoor terraces, the apartment combines the scale and openness typically associated with larger homes, whilst maintaining the simplicity and functionality of a one-bedroom layout.

The property has undergone a series of tasteful upgrades, including enhanced flooring throughout, a refined open kitchen, and a beautifully renovated European-inspired bathroom finished in elegant micro-cement, creating a clean and contemporary aesthetic that complements the architecture of Seventh Heaven perfectly.

Floor-to-ceiling glazing wraps the living spaces, drawing in natural light throughout the day and creating a seamless connection to the oversized terraces overlooking the boulevard and surrounding greenery. The open-plan living and dining area offers exceptional proportions, ideal for both entertaining and day-to-day living.

The kitchen has been subtly upgraded with a more refined modern finish whilst maintaining practicality and openness to the main living space. The principal suite is generously proportioned and accompanied by a spa-like bathroom featuring warm textures, floating vanity detailing, and minimalist European styling.

This is a genuinely rare apartment within Al Barari - offering scale, privacy, extensive outdoor space, and upgraded finishes within one of Dubai’s most architecturally distinctive communities.

For more information or to arrange a viewing please call Ryan Almond our resident Al Barari expert at Maria Morris Global, alternatively visit us in our office located in the retail avenue of Seventh Heaven.
